name: Single filer at very high income above IMSS cap (MXN 2,000,000/year)
description: Employee earning MXN 2,000,000 annually (~USD 97,500). IMSS contributions capped at 25 UMA daily. ISR in the 34% marginal bracket.

sources.description: Calculated using 2026 ISR annual table. ISR = 444,116.23 + (2M - 1,702,567.98) * 34%. IMSS capped at 25 * 117.31 * 365 = 1,070,578.75.
